description: Front panel of the Vulcan OmniPro 220 showing LCD display, voltage/amperage knobs, process selector, and output terminals
Rear panel showing power cord input, gas inlet, and fan
Diagram showing MIG/GMAW polarity setup — DCEP with gun connected to positive terminal and work clamp to negative
Diagram showing Flux-Cored (self-shielded) polarity setup — DCEN with reversed cable connections
Diagram showing TIG/GTAW polarity setup — DCEN with TIG torch on negative terminal, work clamp on positive
Diagram showing Stick/SMAW polarity setup — DCEP with electrode holder on positive, work clamp on negative
Wire feed mechanism showing drive rolls, tension adjustment, and wire path from spool to gun
Weld diagnosis photos showing examples of porosity, undercut, lack of fusion, burn-through, cold lap, and good weld
Internal wiring schematic of the welding power source
Duty cycle chart showing output amps vs. duty cycle percentage for all processes at 120V and 240V
